hooks.command: root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" || { printf '{"decision":"deny","reason":"Guard cannot start: git repository root unavailable."}\n'; exit 0; }; bash "$root/.agents/hooks/guard-destructive-shell.sh"

root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" || { printf '{"decision":"deny","reason":"Guard cannot start: git repository root unavailable."}\n'; exit 0; }; bash "$root/.agents/hooks/guard-secret-paths.sh"

root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" || { printf '{"decision":"deny","reason":"Guard cannot start: git repository root unavailable."}\n'; exit 0; }; bash "$root/.agents/hooks/guard-repository-writes.sh"
